page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shito Ikusei Perfect Guide
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelion Shito Ikusei video game by アミューズメント書籍編集部. It was published by Softbank Creative in August 1999. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4797310359 

Overview

Thoroughly dissect the system, characters, floor areas, events, etc., and explain in detail with illustrations how to raise the Angels. Also includes developer interviews, item lists, and event charts.

Table of Contents

Editions

ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4797310351
